## Summary

- What problem does this PR solve?
- What changed in the user experience or developer workflow?

## Testing

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] Manual browser app smoke test
- [ ] Manual extension smoke test

## Checklist

- [ ] Conventional Commit title
- [ ] No local-only workflow files included by mistake
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed
- [ ] Screenshots or recordings attached for UI changes
